name: messages
schema:
CREATE TABLE "messages" (
	message_id INTEGER NOT NULL, 
	session_id INTEGER, 
	ts TEXT NOT NULL, 
	direction TEXT NOT NULL, 
	nas_msg_type TEXT NOT NULL, 
	identity_type TEXT, 
	eea_selected INTEGER, 
	eia_selected INTEGER, 
	ue_eea_caps INTEGER, 
	ue_eia_caps INTEGER, 
	emm_cause INTEGER, 
	raw_pcap_offset INTEGER, 
	raw_frame_number INTEGER, 
	enb_ue_s1ap_id INTEGER, 
	mme_ue_s1ap_id INTEGER, 
	PRIMARY KEY (message_id), 
	CONSTRAINT ck_messages_direction CHECK (direction IN ('UL', 'DL')), 
	FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions (session_id)
)
